text: - i. Waiver of OCIP-Related Claims. With respect to the OCIP Insurance Program, unless  prohibited  by  law,  Contractor  and  each  Subcontractor  hereby  waives  all rights  of  recovery  because  of  deductible  clauses,  inadequacy  of  limits  of  any insurance policy, limitations or exclusions of coverage against Owner, Contractor, the OCIP Administrator, its or their officers, agents, or employees, and any other Subcontractor  performing  Work  or  rendering  services  on  behalf  of  Owner  in connection with the planning, development and construction of the Project.
